data.name: Cuckold Sex - Episode 6
data.detailed_description:
An erotic VISUAL NOVEL featuring HD graphics, steamy ANIMATIONS, and realistic-looking characters.

Lily and James's romantic getaway to an ocean villa takes a spicy twist when Lily seduces their handsome neighbor by the pool.

Will James be content to watch the show from the sidelines?

  

GAME DESCRIPTION

Join Lily and James on their quest to spice up their marriage.

 

EPISODE 6 

Their marriage has never been better, and James decides to spoil Lily with a romantic getaway to a luxurious villa on the sun-kissed shores of the Caribbean, eager to have his wife all to himself. However, fate has other plans, and they find themselves sharing a duplex with a handsome stranger.

Mindful that not everyone shares their sexually adventurous spirit, James is prepared to tone down their wild antics and keep their steamy encounters behind closed doors. But Lily's playful nature soon emerges, disrupting his carefully laid plans.

With her eyes on the handsome neighbor, Lily can’t resist the temptation and turns up the heat by the pool. She's determined to seduce him while James watches from the sidelines.

Will their neighbor succumb to Lily’s irresistible charms?

Will James be content to enjoy the show from afar?

Follow the story to find out.


FEATURES

- HD renders and animations

- Video and image gallery

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
